mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (userId, username, salt, PASSWORD, telephone, sex, imageUrl, registerTime, available) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username},#{salt}, #{password}, #{telephone}, #{sex}, #{imageUrl}, #{registerTime}, 1);
mapper.select: select b.* from user_role a left join role b on b.roleId = a.roleId where userId = #{userId}

SELECT u.userId, u.username, u.telephone, u.email, u.available, u.registerTime, s.totalStorageSize, (SELECT SUM(f.fileSize) FROM userfile uf LEFT JOIN file f ON uf.fileId = f.fileId WHERE uf.userId = u.userId AND uf.deleteFlag = 0) as storageSize FROM user u LEFT JOIN storage s ON u.userId = s.userId
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userSearchDTO.username}, '%')
AND u.telephone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userSearchDTO.telephone}, '%')
ORDER BY u.registerTime DESC
